'''''Wolf's Claw''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]]. It was one of the three ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers assigned as support for [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gaen Drommel]]'s [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']]. The ''Wolf's Claw'' participated in the [[Battle of Tantive V]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], where it was captured by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces and later incorporated into the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].
